title: Vivecraft TB Compat
description: This mod adds compatibility to open Backpacks from Traveler's Backpack to Vivecraft/QuestCraft!
body:
This mod fixes the issues with opening backpacks between Traveler's Backpack and Vivecraft/QuestCraft.

Just replace the "Open backpack" key in your radial menu with the "[VR] Open backpack" keybind and voila, it works!

If you encounter any problems with this mod or it isn't working like it should, feel free to open up an [issue on GitHub](https://github.com/VRealmsMC/VivecraftTBCompat/issues)!
